subcodes.title: Panj Kanz (The Five Treasures)
subcodes.first_line: Dost thou know what sort of person is worthy of hearing My words and is fit to enter My presence?
subcodes.first_line_orig: کنز اول قومی در بیرونی بیت قدَم میزدند وبرخی از شاهزادگان ایران حضور داشتند
subcodes.subjects: @mission of the Manifestation of God in the world, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @fellowship with the wayward and ungodly, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom
